name: Runelings
description:
The ultimate Ordinals collection inscribed on Bitcoin — with a prize pool worth over $1,000,000.

✅ Mint a Runeling PFP
✅ Enter the $1M+ Prize Pool
✅ A shot at 1 full Bitcoin
✅ A shot at the legendary 4-Megger Runestone (8 $BTC)
✅ Receive the Runelings token airdrop

Additional notes:
🔸 1 Runeling = 1 entry
🔸 1 in 10 Runelings will win a prize
🔸 Every Runeling holder receives the token airdrop
